title: HUNTER x HUNTER NEN x SURVIVOR | Launch Guide, Gameplay, and Nen Abilities
subtitle: The free-to-play roguelike survivor game based on Hunter x Hunter launched globally February 18, 2026 on iOS, Android, and PC via Google Play Games. Full guide to characters, Nen types, progression, and what to expect.
thumbnail_alt: Hunter x Hunter Nen x Survivor mobile game gameplay screenshot
tags: HUNTER x HUNTER NEN x SURVIVOR
content_html:
HUNTER x HUNTER NEN x SURVIVOR is a free-to-play roguelike survivor game based on the Hunter x Hunter manga and anime franchise by Yoshihiro Togashi. Published by Bushiroad and developed by WonderPlanet, the game launched globally on February 18, 2026 for iOS, Android, and Windows via Google Play Games. It is available as a free download on the Google Play Store, Apple App Store, and Google Play Games for PC.

The game adapts the Hunter x Hunter property into a top-down roguelike survivor format, a genre popularized by Vampire Survivors (2022) and subsequently adapted by dozens of mobile publishers for anime IP. Players control a Hunter character against waves of enemies, selecting Nen ability upgrades between waves to build a run-specific loadout. The core appeal is the game's use of the franchise's ability system, Nen, as its upgrade and character differentiation mechanic.

QUICK FACTS

  • Title: HUNTER x HUNTER NEN x SURVIVOR
  • Developer: WonderPlanet
  • Publisher: Bushiroad
  • Release date: February 18, 2026 (global)
  • Platforms: iOS, Android, Windows (Google Play Games)
  • Price: Free to play (in-app purchases)
  • Genre: Roguelike survivor / action
  • License: Hunter x Hunter, Yoshihiro Togashi / Shueisha

Gameplay | Roguelike Survivor Structure with Nen Upgrades

NEN x SURVIVOR follows the core loop of the roguelike survivor genre: each run is a timed wave-survival session in which the player character automatically attacks while the player focuses entirely on movement and build selection. Between waves, players choose from randomized ability upgrades. Runs end when the character dies or the session is completed.

The game's distinguishing mechanic is the Nen ability system, which mirrors the power framework from the source material. In Hunter x Hunter, all Nen users have a natural affinity for one of six Nen types: Enhancer, Emitter, Transmuter, Conjurer, Manipulator, and Specialist. NEN x SURVIVOR builds its upgrade selection and character synergies around these six types, with each playable character having a primary Nen affinity that influences what abilities are available during a run.

ENHANCER

Physical amplification. Gon Freecss is the flagship Enhancer. Enhancer builds focus on high single-hit damage and durability.

TRANSMUTER

Nen property change. Killua Zoldyck is the flagship Transmuter, converting his aura to electricity. Transmuter builds are high-speed attack focused.

EMITTER

Ranged aura projection. Leorio and Kurapika have Emitter or adjacent affinities. Builds focus on area damage and projectile chains.

CONJURER / MANIPULATOR / SPECIALIST

Advanced types with unique rules. Hisoka (Transmuter-Specialist hybrid) and Kurapika (Specialist) represent the rarer affinities in the playable roster.

Playable Characters | Roster at Launch

The launch roster includes the core cast of Hunter x Hunter's Yorknew City and Chimera Ant arcs:

  • Gon Freecss — Enhancer. Primary protagonist. Jajanken Rock attack as signature move. High base damage, straightforward upgrade path.
  • Killua Zoldyck — Transmuter. Godspeed electricity amplification. High critical hit rate, fastest movement speed in the base roster.
  • Kurapika — Specialist/Conjurer. Chain jail mechanic applies to builds involving binding and crowd control. Unique Scarlet Eyes power state.
  • Leorio Paradinight — Emitter/Enhancer. Doctor + aura projection hybrid. Support-adjacent build options with area heal capabilities.
  • Hisoka Morow — Transmuter/Specialist. Bungee Gum mechanic creates elastic binding attack patterns. High risk, high reward build style.
  • Gon (Adult form) — Unlockable variant. Adult Gon's Nen sacrifice state from the Chimera Ant arc as a selectable high-power form.

Post-launch character additions have included Neferpitou, Meruem, and Netero, with Phantom Troupe members added in the first major content update. Bushiroad follows the standard mobile game calendar of new character banners every 3-4 weeks.

Is HUNTER x HUNTER NEN x SURVIVOR Worth Playing?

For Hunter x Hunter fans, the game is a competent adaptation of the Nen system into a mobile-appropriate genre. The roguelike survivor format fits the franchise's power-scaling philosophy, where creative ability combinations determine outcomes more than raw numbers. The six Nen type framework gives the build system more structural coherence than most anime mobile titles.

For players without a Hunter x Hunter background, NEN x SURVIVOR is a solid entry-level roguelike survivor with more mechanical depth than typical mobile titles in the genre. The Nen system's logic is explained in-game without requiring franchise knowledge. However, the game's monetization follows the standard anime mobile model: core gameplay is free, rare characters and skins require gacha pulls using a premium currency. Long-session players who want the full roster will need to spend or grind aggressively.
